channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Rust in Production: Why Python and JS Devs Are Switching Now
item.description: Cut API latency from 420ms to 18ms and memory from 2.1GB to 320MB by rewriting a Node.js app in Rust. Learn the real differences, gotchas, and tools that make Rust worth the switch for Python and JavaScript developers.

item.title: Python CPU profiling shows 95% idle—here’s why it’s lying
item.description: Cut Python endpoint latency from 4.2s to 650ms by fixing connection pools, CPU serialization, and CPU throttling — with exact commands, benchmarks, and CI checks to prevent regressions.

item.title: AI apps without machine learning knowledge finally explained
item.description: Ship AI features in under 1.2s latency and $15/month using cloud APIs and open models — prompt engineering, vector search, and cost tricks that pros use

item.title: Ship a Mobile App That Stays on Phones for Years
item.description: Ship a Mobile App That Stays on Phones for Years — learn SQLite retries, background sync survival, and crash-free session rates under 1% with real device tests in Lagos, Bangalore, and São Paulo to cut user churn by 70% and keep apps alive after OS restarts and low memory kills.

item.title: The 12 must-have database tools in 2026 (ranked)
item.description: Cut p99 database latency by 53% with the 12 must-have tools in 2026 — concrete benchmarks, setup times, and the mistakes that cost me weeks of debugging.

item.title: MLOps: Deploying AI Models Without Breaking Everything: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut MLOps: Deploying AI Models Without Breaking Everything failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistak…

item.title: Building in Public vs Keeping it Private: Build or Break
item.description: Hit $5k MRR 2x faster with building in public — GitHub changelogs, Discord communities, and the hidden costs that break momentum. Learn what 18 indie projects taught me about transparency vs secrecy.

item.title: WebAssembly Crashes When JavaScript Chokes on Heavy Loops (and How to Fix It)
item.description: WebAssembly Crashes JavaScript Chokes: e flat at 100% for the entire time. You open. Practical guide with real examples.

item.title: Freelance Dev Income: $75k/yr From 20 Hours/Week
item.description: Freelance dev income jumped from $50k to $75k/year in 6 months by fixing late payments, publishing fixed-scope packages, and inserting maintenance upsells — real numbers and code snippets included.

item.title: Technical Debt: Static Analysis vs Runtime Profiling
item.description: Cut technical debt paydown time by 60% with combined static analysis and runtime profiling — SonarQube, Pyroscope, and the mistakes that cost $47K in a single incident.

item.title: Why Apple’s chips let them charge $1,600 for a phone nobody else can copy
item.description: Cut app latency from 45ms to 18ms by using Metal MPS, Swift Concurrency, and Xcode Cloud on Apple Silicon — real benchmarks and code that prove why iPhones justify $1,600 prices while others can’t copy it.

item.title: Tech layoffs 2026 finally explained
item.description: Cut tech layoffs in 2026 by 40% with revenue_per_employee tracking, AI infra cost modeling, and furlough programs — benchmarks, benchmarks, and the mistakes that make the difference.

item.title: How we cut API cost 60% with rate limiting that survived Black Friday
item.description: Cut API cost by 63% and 429s to zero with a hybrid sliding-window plus token-bucket rate limiter that handled 5M req/min and kept p95 latency under 200 ms during Black Friday. Includes Go code, Redis Streams setup, and staging checklist.

item.title: React vs Next.js vs Remix: Choosing the Right Tool: A Practical Technical Guide
item.description: Cut React vs Next.js vs Remix: Choosing the Right Tool failures by understanding connection pooling and retry logic — real benchmarks, common mistakes, …

item.title: How Rwanda, Vietnam and Estonia built AI infra faster than California
item.description: Cut AI serving costs by 90% with Rwanda’s RPi + T4 stack — 4 ms edge latency, 220 ms mid-tier, and the real ISP egress tricks nobody mentions. Build it in a day.

item.title: The 9 cheapest ways to deploy a web app in 2026
item.description: Launch a production web app for $3.50/month with Hetzner CX11, SQLite, and Nginx—measure real latency, CPU throttling, and idle costs for 2026 deployments.

item.title: Go concurrency in 30 minutes: 100K goroutines under 2s
item.description: l fell by 38% because we could now run 10× with concurrency minutes 100K goroutines — cut the 47-second average response time to under 5.

item.title: Queries timing out after 30 seconds? Your indexes are hiding in plain sight
item.description: Cut query latency from 30 seconds to under 200ms by fixing hidden index mismatches — refresh statistics, tune random_page_cost, and stop expression-based predicates from breaking index usage. Real benchmarks and fixes from a fintech SRE’s war room.

item.title: SOLID vs Anti-Patterns in Real Projects
item.description: Cut incident recovery time from 4 hours to 30 seconds with SOLID in real projects while keeping anti-patterns 30% faster to ship. Practical guide to when SOLID works and when to ship messy code.

item.title: WhatsApp’s chat system finally explained
item.description: Cut end-to-end chat latency to 250 ms and $0.0000015 per message with WebSocket edges, Kafka queues, and Signal encryption — the same stack WhatsApp uses.
